page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 8 dedicated vCPUs mapped directly to 8 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6462C processor, operating at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 8 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation model ensures consistent, non-shared processing power, which enhances performance stability for workloads requiring predictable execution times. This resource density represents a balanced general-purpose profile with a high-frequency CPU core design.

Given its balanced 1:4 CPU-to-memory ratio and dedicated high-frequency Intel Xeon cores, the ecs.hfg8i.2xlarge is suited for general-purpose workloads, application servers, web serving, and moderate computational tasks that benefit from dedicated physical cores without hyper-threading.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg8i.2xlarge is a KVM-based x86_64 server instance configured with 8 dedicated vCPUs and 32.0 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz, it features 8 physical cores with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyper-threading. The instance provides a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core and a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for general-purpose applications, web serving, and moderate compute workloads requiring predictable, dedicated CPU performance.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core Intel Xeon server with a balanced memory profile and high-frequency processing for predictable general-purpose workloads.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
